DLY-TEN.label: Tenant timing
DLY-TEN.description: Current or recently vacated tenant. Cannot list until tenancy formally ends.
DLY-TEN.best_action: Confirm tenancy end date precisely. Sign agreement now — Stayful can begin onboarding in parallel. First live date is tenant exit + 2-3 weeks for setup.
DLY-TEN.risk: Tenant extends or squats. Keep warm with monthly income reminder. If 8+ weeks away, suggest light touch follow-up cadence.

example_entry.situation: Tenants leaving Bristol 3-bed BS3. Meeting was cut short but tenancy end creates natural start date.

DLY-FUR.label: Furnishing / renovation incomplete
DLY-FUR.description: Property needs furnishing or refurbishment before listing. Owner knows this. Timeline depends on their pace.
DLY-FUR.best_action: Offer furnishing consultation. Stayful can recommend suppliers and advise on what matters for guest scores. Signing now lets setup planning run in parallel.
DLY-FUR.risk: Renovation takes longer than planned — typical delay doubles. Set a check-in at midpoint.

example_entry.situation: Coventry 5-bed purchased for STL. Renovation 2-3 months. Year 1 figures slightly under £1k/mo target — Year 2 trajectory + direct bookings are the close.

DLY-PUR.label: Purchase completion pending
DLY-PUR.description: Lead doesn't yet own the property — off-plan, exchange complete, or awaiting key handover.
DLY-PUR.best_action: Sign agreement before keys. Developer management relationship is the risk — engage early and lock in before handover.
DLY-PUR.risk: Developer offers bundled management at key handover (see entries 033, PURCH lost pattern). Pipeline closed early wins.

example_entry.situation: Keys May 29. Existing Stayful client expanding to Manchester 1-bed. Converted immediately. Critical path: photos → furnishing → live mid-June before summer.

DLY-MOV.label: Moving / relocating abroad
DLY-MOV.description: Owner is moving away — either already abroad or leaving within weeks. STL is the plan for while they're gone.
DLY-MOV.best_action: Tie decision to departure date. Calculate income per week of delay. Stayful handles everything remotely — this is the ideal use case.
DLY-MOV.risk: Post-departure follow-up is harder. Decisions made before they leave are 3x more likely to convert.

example_entry.situation: Returns to Indonesia June 30. Competing LTL offer is live. Even worst month (Sept ~£800) > LTL (£644). Shower recurring issue must be resolved pre-listing.

DLY-OTH.label: Other / unspecified delay
DLY-OTH.description: Catch-all for general hesitation: more research, spouse/partner decision, price comparison, or unvoiced concern. Most common delay code by far.
DLY-OTH.best_action: Surface the real gate. Ask directly: 'Is there a specific thing holding you back from moving forward this week?' Most DLY-OTH leads have a real objection they haven't voiced.
DLY-OTH.risk: Without surfacing the real gate, lead goes cold within 2-3 weeks. DLY-OTH with no follow-up = lost.
